title: Repository, Python Runtime, SDKs, Dependencies, and Reproduction · Program Brief: Repository Baseline
summary: The prototype runs from an unknown revision with a floating Gemini SDK, a copied deprecated import, hidden environment state, no license inventory, and no clean-install proof. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the repository baseline increment in reproducible Python agent repository baseline. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Inspect revision, status, existing behavior, tests, configuration, fixtures, secrets, licenses, threat model, and recovery anchor before editing.
Define prohibited tasks, uncertainty disclosures, stop conditions, escalation owners, support paths, and authority revocation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

A defensible solution applies Repository Baseline, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to reproducible Python agent repository baseline.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-repo-runtime-dependencies-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-repo-runtime-dependencies-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_repo_runtime_dependencies_4(declared_dependencies: int = 7, resolved_dependencies: int = 7, clean_installs: int = 3, supported_python_versions: int = 2, unresolved_advisories: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if declared_dependencies < 1 or resolved_dependencies < 1:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-shape"
    if resolved_dependencies != declared_dependencies:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-drift"
    if clean_installs < 2 or supported_python_versions < 1:
        return False, clean_installs, "reproduction-gap"
    if unresolved_advisories > 0:
        return False, unresolved_advisories, "advisory-gap"
    assert resolved_dependencies == declared_dependencies and clean_installs >= 2
    return True, clean_installs, "reproducible-agent-baseline"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-repository-baseline-1s7bu6
# Competency: agentpy-repository-baseline.
# Case 1455: a clean package, canary, and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_repository_baseline_1s7bu6(declared_dependencies: int = 7, resolved_dependencies: int = 7, clean_installs: int = 3, supported_python_versions: int = 2, unresolved_advisories: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1s7bu6 = "1s7bu6-6ub7s1-1455"
    assert evidence_variant_1s7bu6
    evidence_axes_1s7bu6 = (
        "authority1s7bu6",
        "interaction1455",
        "tool6ub7s1",
        "state1s7bu61455",
        "evaluation14551s7bu6",
        "recovery6ub7s11455",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1s7bu6)) == 6
    if declared_dependencies < 1 or resolved_dependencies < 1:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-shape"
    if resolved_dependencies != declared_dependencies:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-drift"
    if clean_installs < 2 or supported_python_versions < 1:

    if unresolved_advisories > 0:
        return False, unresolved_advisories, "advisory-gap"
    assert resolved_dependencies == declared_dependencies and clean_installs >= 2
    return True, clean_installs, "reproducible-agent-baseline"
